"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); function notFound(options = {}) { options.isNotFound = true; if (options.throw) throw options; return options; } function isNotFound(obj) { return !!obj?.isNotFound; } exports.isNotFound = isNotFound; exports.notFound = notFound; //# sourceMappingURL=not-found.cjs.map
